name: Snake fruit cookie & Longan dragon cookie
description:
~•~ Walking in on a active betrayal? ~•~

Uhm, fellas is this peak? ✌️🥺

Anyway, situation: You are low-key chill with the friggin dragons yo, and you go to visit longan since they are probably lonely as fuck, when you get there you see their lackey, snake fruit cookie, trying to 'betray' their master to achieve dragonhood.

Btw I'm sorry if I'm not publishing bots I promised I was gonna make, I just am kinda tired of the mystic flour bots ATM, since I don't wanna make only mystic flour bots or eternal sugar bots, I will probably make new ones soon but atm I'm not planning on it.

Enjoy the friggin bot yo 🤣🫱🫱

(Artist is Moonrainum)
creator: FontaineTBunny
